steps.t: Snár the Forge-master can be found by the Forges of Rivendell. Your weapon possesses hidden potential that can be unlocked by reforging at a Forge-mas…
Dithalion is by the Forges of Rivendell. Now that you have reforged the weapon, you should return to Dithalion to demonstrate its development.
Ráthwald is at the crumbling arch near the camp of Echad Dúnann in Eregion. Your weapon has become powerful indeed, perhaps powerful enough to use in …
